gitCommit.subject: feat(infra): enforce Node 22 via CDK Aspect + add ephemeral stack cleanup workflow
gitCommit.body:
feat(infra): enforce Node 22 via CDK Aspect + add ephemeral stack cleanup workflow

- Add LambdaRuntimeMinVersionAspect that upgrades any Lambda running
  Node 20 or earlier to Node 22 at CDK synth time; applied globally in
  bin/app.ts so all future deploys are covered without per-stack changes
- Add unit tests for the Aspect (upgrade, no-op, non-Lambda resource)
- Add .github/workflows/ephemeral-stack-cleanup.yml: scheduled weekly
  (Mondays 6am UTC) + manual dispatch with dry_run=true default; uses
  bash associative arrays to deduplicate stages before destroying so
  each stale stage is destroyed exactly once regardless of nested stack
  count; skips protected stages (main, val, production, datasink, snyk)
